mapper.select: SELECT o.*, oi.id oi_id, oi.order_id oi_order_id, oi.order_sn oi_order_sn, oi.product_id oi_product_id, oi.product_pic oi_product_pic, oi.product_name oi_product_name, oi.product_brand oi_product_brand, oi.product_sn oi_product_sn, oi.product_price oi_product_price, oi.product_quantity oi_product_quantity, oi.product_sku_id oi_product_sku_id, oi.product_sku_code oi_product_sku_code, oi.product_category_id oi_product_category_id, oi.promotion_name oi_promotion_name, oi.promotion_amount oi_promotion_amount, oi.coupon_amount oi_coupon_amount, oi.integration_amount oi_integration_amount, oi.real_amount oi_real_amount, oi.gift_integration oi_gift_integration, oi.gift_growth oi_gift_growth, oi.product_attr oi_product_attr FROM oms_order o LEFT JOIN oms_order_item oi ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE o.id = #{id}

SELECT o.*, oi.id oi_id, oi.order_id oi_order_id, oi.order_sn oi_order_sn, oi.product_id oi_product_id, oi.product_pic oi_product_pic, oi.product_name oi_product_name, oi.product_brand oi_product_brand, oi.product_sn oi_product_sn, oi.product_price oi_product_price, oi.product_quantity oi_product_quantity, oi.product_sku_id oi_product_sku_id, oi.product_sku_code oi_product_sku_code, oi.product_category_id oi_product_category_id, oi.promotion_name oi_promotion_name, oi.promotion_amount oi_promotion_amount, oi.coupon_amount oi_coupon_amount, oi.integration_amount oi_integration_amount, oi.real_amount oi_real_amount, oi.gift_integration oi_gift_integration, oi.gift_growth oi_gift_growth, oi.product_attr oi_product_attr FROM oms_order o LEFT JOIN oms_order_item oi ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 0 AND o.delete_status = 0 AND o.create_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{minute} MINUTE)
